# API Checklist: Return a Single Estimated Value

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for single-value estimate responses.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/013-single-value-estimate/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request/response schemas fully specified for success, validation error, normalization error, and valuation error? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are response fields specified for timestamp, location summary, baseline metadata, warnings, and request ID? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are formatting rules for currency and rounding explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Are request tracing requirements (return id vs log) explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do API requirements align with UI flow requirements for single-value display and warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK006 Are requirements defined for API behavior when location is ambiguous or unresolvable? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
